# Notion Page Mappings
# Format: markdown_file_path=notion_page_id
# Lines starting with # are comments

# How to find a Notion page ID:
#   1. Open the page in Notion
#   2. Click "Share" > "Copy link"
#   3. The 32-character hex string at the end of the URL is the page ID

# Security review guides and docs
# security-review-guide.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID
# security-architecture-review-template.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID
# reviews/TRACKING.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID

# Guides
# guides/quick-security-review.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID
# guides/self-service-checklist.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID
# guides/making-a-github-repo-public.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID

# Automation docs
# automation/sdd-review.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID
# automation/pr-review.md=YOUR_NOTION_PAGE_ID
